subject: [PATCH v2 02/21] nfsd: add missing read barrier to rpc_status_get dumpit seqcount retry

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch adds a missing read memory barrier to the rpc_status_get_dumpit function in nfsd_nl_rpc_status_get_dumpit(). The barrier ensures that all data reads complete before re-checking the status counter, preventing potential issues on weakly-ordered architectures. This fix is necessary because the hand-rolled seqcount-like protocol in this function lacks a read memory barrier, which can lead to inconsistent results and ineffective retry logic.
